headings.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none text-[#2D5016]

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. Allow natural photography to breathe. Avoid generic card constraints when possible.
layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 lg:gap-8

components_strategy.header: Sticky nav, backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F5EDD6]/90 border-b border-[#2D5016]/10. Must contain Cart icon and WhatsApp icon.

buttons.primary: bg-[#2D5016] text-[#F5EDD6] hover:bg-[#1F3A0F] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#2D5016] text-[#2D5016] hover:bg-[#2D5016] hover:text-[#F5EDD6] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all
buttons.accent: bg-[#C8602B] text-white hover:bg-[#A94E21] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(200,96,43,0.39)] transition-all

components_strategy.cards: bg-[#FFFFFF] rounded-2xl p-6 border border-[#2D5016]/10 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
components_strategy.inputs: bg-[#FFFFFF] border border-[#2D5016]/20 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2D5016]/50 focus:border-[#2D5016] text-[#1A2F0D]
components_strategy.overlays: Never use opaque black over organic images. Use bg-gradient-to-t from-[#1A2F0D]/80 to-transparent for text contrast on hero images.

visual_enhancers.motion: Subtle, organic transitions. Use framer-motion for slow, gentle reveal of sections (fade in up). Image hover should trigger a slow scale-up (scale-105 duration-700 ease-out).
visual_enhancers.surfaces: Mix flat solid cream backgrounds with clean white cards. Use 'Tracing Beam' or subtle glowing borders sparingly for premium features (like 'Subscribe & Save').

iconography.style: Clean, thin stroke (1.5px), color matching primary (#2D5016) or accent (#C8602B)

hero_pouring.description: Golden oil pouring, used for primary hero banner

oil_close_up.description: Close up of liquid, good for product features

farmer_story.description: Indian farmer in field, used for About Us or Farmer Story section

farmer_group.description: Group of farmers, used for community/sourcing transparency

grains_display.description: Baskets filled with grains, ideal for Collections or Grains category

spices_display.description: Spoon of spices, ideal for Spices category

product_placeholder_1.description: Metal bowl with seeds, product image placeholder

product_placeholder_2.description: Plate of food, product image placeholder

media.guidelines: Do not stretch images. Use object-cover for all image containers. Wrap all images in div containers with hidden overflow.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format indicating role (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-button', data-testid='hero-cta-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Playfair Display for all headers and Inter for all body text.
Ensure the hero section overlay is a gradient to transparent, not a flat opaque black blanket, preserving the organic imagery.
Implement the bundle builder as a step-by-step wizard using Shadcn components customized with brand colors.
Use generous padding (py-16 to py-24) to create a relaxed, earthy feel.
Apply 'data-testid' to every form input, button, and dynamic link.
Do not use default Shadcn border radius everywhere; respect the rounded-2xl for cards and rounded-full for buttons as defined.
Avoid generic sans fonts for headers; Playfair Display is mandatory.
Use Lucide icons sparingly and match them to primary or accent color.
Ensure mobile responsiveness is prioritized, specially for the sticky Add To Cart on Product Pages.
